positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a cosmic forest. The scene features monolithic, glowing bioluminescent trees with delicate crystalline leaves, intertwined with swirling nebula patterns and floating, geometric celestial bodies. The overall aesthetic is neo-psychedelic and highly detailed, rendered with clean, strong silhouettes and negative space. Use a palette of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, glowing violet, and accents of metallic gold. Composition must be perfectly centered, ideal for an apparel print, utilizing high contrast lighting (chiaroscuro) to make the glowing elements pop against the dark void. The style should blend Art Deco symmetry with ethereal vaporwave gradients, ensuring sharp lines and vibrant, flat color blocking suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noisy, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, letter, words, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, amateur, messy, jpeg artifacts, dirty, grain
